Moi._comment: MOI SSO gateway. Mode 'simulated' validates against the local admin store; switch to 'real' once the ministry API is live and set BaseUrl.

Biometric._comment: Biometric device gateway (BRD §8). Mode 'simulated' generates deterministic capture/match with no hardware. 'real' calls a generic device HTTP SDK (BaseUrl/CapturePath/MatchPath). 'zkbiotime' integrates the ZKBioTime/BioTime 8.x platform via ZkBioTime.* below. Consumers are unchanged either way.

ZkBioTime._comment: ZKBioTime/BioTime 8.x adapter. Set Biometric:Mode=zkbiotime and fill BaseUrl/Username/Password. Enrollment ensures a personnel record (emp_code+department+area required; templates are enrolled on the terminal); verification polls the punch stream within VerifyWindowSeconds. AuthPath+TokenScheme are paired: '/jwt-api-token-auth/'+'JWT' or '/api-token-auth/'+'Token'. ServerTimeUtcOffsetHours aligns our query window to the platform's local clock.
